{{Quote|Gunnery, get a firing solution on that big rock and open it up.|Urias Xhaxin|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught">''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]''</ref>}}
'''Mirip Pag''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Iotran/Legends|Iotran]] gunnery officer who served onboard the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Urias Xhaxin]]'s [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Free Lance]]'' during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Biography==
In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], Mirip was onboard the ''[[Free Lance]]'' when the frigate was under attack by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Pag discovered that the fire of the ''Free Lance'' was absorbed by the Yuuzhan Vong vessels.

{{Char-stub}}
